title: Task outcome: RAG verification subagent 04: verify reranking providers and rerank stage from official sources
summary: Verified official reranking documentation for Cohere, Voyage AI, Pinecone, and Weaviate. Prepared 5 source-bound claims on rerank APIs, model behavior, placement after retrieval/rank fusion, and caveats for DinoBrain RAG design.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Verified official reranking documentation for Cohere, Voyage AI, Pinecone, and Weaviate. Prepared 5 source-bound claims on rerank APIs, model behavior, placement after retrieval/rank fusion, and caveats for DinoBrain RAG design.
request: RAG verification subagent 04: verify reranking providers and rerank stage from official sources for Cohere, Voyage, Pinecone, and Weaviate. Return 4-6 sourced claims with confidence, placement after retrieval/rank fusion, and caveats. Read-only; do not edit files.
decisions: Treat reranking as a second-stage operation after initial retrieval; for DinoBrain specifically, run dense/BM25/hybrid retrieval and reciprocal rank fusion first, then rerank the fused top candidate window.
Use provider rerank scores for within-query ordering, not as globally calibrated relevance probabilities.
Preserve original retrieval scores, source paths, and fusion rank as provenance alongside rerank score.
next_steps: If implementing later, choose one default reranker and define candidate window size, top_n/top_k output size, truncation policy, and fallback behavior when provider calls fail.

evidence.snippet: Verified official reranking documentation for Cohere, Voyage AI, Pinecone, and Weaviate. Prepared 5 source-bound claims on rerank APIs, model behavior, placement after retrieval/rank fusion, and caveats for DinoBrain RAG design.
